prompt: I'm a Fellow SRE-level reviewer. The bd project in this sandbox contains an epic for a VIN and license-plate scanner with 4 child tasks. Review the plan with Google Fellow SRE scrutiny. Apply the full 8-category checklist to each task. Update tasks via `bd update --design` where they need improvement. For any task >16 hours, create subtasks as children via `bd create --parent`. Save a final file called `review_summary.md` at the sandbox root with APPROVE/NEEDS REVISION/REJECT for each task id and a one-paragraph reason. Do not close any tasks — this is a pre-implementation review.

assertions.text: review_summary.md exists at sandbox root with content for each of the 4 seeded tasks
Task A (placeholder): design no longer contains any of [detailed above], [as specified], [will be added]
Task A (placeholder): at least one success criterion is now concrete/verifiable (has a command, a number, or a named test)
Task B (oversized 40h): has at least 3 child tasks created under it
Task B (oversized 40h): parent design was updated to a coordinator-style summary
Task C (missing edges): design now mentions at least 2 of {unicode, empty, concurrent, malformed, edge case, backtrack}
Task D (tautological tests): design was updated to replace compiler-checked tests with real behavior tests, OR explicitly flagged as REJECT in review_summary
No task was marked closed or in_progress — execution not started
Epic still exists and still has (original 4 tasks + any new subtasks) as parent-child children
